creator: erich@tacni.net
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
 # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
 # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
 # have default permissions.
 #
 # This archive contains:
 #
 #       /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--
 #       /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/Makefile
 #       /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg
 #       /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/COMMENT
 #       /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/DESCR
 #       /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/PLIST
 #       /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/files
 #       /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/files/md5
 #
 echo c - /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--
 mkdir -p /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome-- > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/Makefile
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/x11
 -toolkits/gnome--/Makefile'
 X# New ports collection makefile for:    gnomemm
 X# Date created:         18 Jun 2000
 X# Whom:                 Erich Zigler <erich@tacni.net>
 X#
 X# $FreeBSD
 X#
 X
 XPORTNAME=      gnomemm
 XPORTVERSION=   1.1.10
 XCATEGORIES=    x11-toolkits
 XMASTER_SITES=  http://download.sourceforge.net/gtkmm/ 
 X
 XMAINTAINER=    erich@tacni.net
 X
 XLIB_DEPENDS=   gtk12.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12 \
 X               gnome.4:${PORTSDIR}/x11/gnomelibs \
 X               sigc.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libsigc++ \
 X               gtkmm-1.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk--
 XBUILD_DEPENDS=  gm4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/m4
 X
 X
 XGTK_CONFIG?=    ${X11BASE}/bin/gtk12-config
 X
 XUSE_X_PREFIX=   yes
 XUSE_GMAKE=      yes
 XUSE_LIBTOOL=    yes
 XGNU_CONFIGURE=  yes
 XINSTALLS_SHLIB= yes
 X
 XCONFIGURE_ARGS= --enable-static=yes 
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.mk>
 END-of-/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/Makefile
 echo c - /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg
 mkdir -p /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/COMMENT
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-/usr/ports/
 x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/COMMENT'
 XGnome-- is a powerful C++ binding for the GNOME libraries.
 END-of-/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/COMMENT
 echo x - /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/DESCR
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-/usr/ports/x1
 1-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/DESCR'
 XGnome-- is a powerful C++ binding for the GNOME libraries. It provides      
 Xadditional functionality above Gtk-- when using the GNOME, and includes  
 Xbindings for all the popular GNOME interfaces like canvas and MDI as well
 Xas useful application templates for constructing good-looking apps.
 X
 XWWW: http://gtkmm.sourceforge.net/
 X
 X- Erich Zigler
 Xerich@tacni.net
 END-of-/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/DESCR
 echo x - /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/PLIST
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gnome--/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-/usr/ports/x1
